DISCLAIMER: Under construction, use the results with caution.

start_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

end_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

simulate_animals.description: Whether or not to simulate animals during the simulation

nutrient_standard.description: The nutrient standard to use for feed.

FIPS_county_code.description: Unique 5-digit code that represents a specific U.S. county.

include_detailed_values.description: Whether or not to add detailed_values property to the json output

calf_num.description: Number of Calves (head) -- The initial number of pre-weaned calves

heiferI_num.description: Number of HeiferI's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are weaned but not yet bred

heiferII_num.description: Number of HeiferII's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are either eligible for breeding (based on user-inputted Breeding Start Day for heifers), or in early pregnancy

heiferIII_num_springers.description: Number of HeiferIII's (head) -- The initial number of close-up heifers (heifers within the user-defined close-up period, i.e. Prefresh Day)

cow_num.description: Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows.

replace_num.description: Replacements (head) -- Number of replacement animals available in the replacement market

herd_num.description: Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on the farm

breed.description: Breed (select one) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)

parity_fractions.description: Fractions of the milking animal population that are parity 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5 and greater. The sum of these fractions must be 1.0

milking_cow_fraction.description: Fraction of cows assumed to be in milk at any given time (305/365 is the default).

annual_milk_yield.description: The total milk yield generated by the farm in one year (kg). If this information is not available, it can be input as null

initial_animal_num.description: The initial number of animals for the simulation starting with to generate the herd

simulation_days.description: The number of days to simulate for generating the herd

breeding_start_day_h.description: Heifer Breeding Start Day (days) -- Days old when RuFaS initiates estrus detection (first cycle to occur between 1-21 days later)

heifer_repro_method.description: Heifer Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Synchronized Estrus Detection

cow_repro_method.description: Cow Reproduction Protocol (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI - Combination of ED and TAI

semen_type.description: Semen type (select one) -- The semen type (sexed or conventional) that makes up a majority of the farm's breedings

days_in_preg_when_dry.description: Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average days in pregnancy of cows at dry-off

heifer_repro_cull_time.description: Heifer Reproduction Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for failure to become pregnant

do_not_breed_time.description: Cow Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The length of the breeding period after parturition for cows after which reproduction protocols stop if they fail to get pregnant

cull_milk_production.description: Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Milk production threshold at which 'do not breed' cows are culled if they fall below

cow_times_milked_per_day.description: Number of Milkings (per day) -- The average or most common number of times cows are milked per day (1, 2, or 3 times daily)

milk_fat_percent.description: Milk Fat Percent (percent) -- The average or most common milk fat percentage in cow milk

milk_protein_percent.description: Milk Protein Percent (percent) -- The average or most common milk protein percentage in cow milk

male_calf_rate_sexed_semen.description: Male Calf Rate, Sexed Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen

male_calf_rate_conventional_semen.description: Male Calf Rate, Conventional Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen

keep_female_calf_rate.description: Female Calf Retention Rate (percent) -- The percentage of female calves kept and raised on-farm

wean_day.description: Wean Day (days) -- The days of age at which calves are fully weaned from milk or milk replacer

wean_length.description: Wean Length (days) -- Length of the weaning process

milk_type.description: Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)

voluntary_waiting_period.description: Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- When the cow's days in milk has reached this day, monitoring for estrus and subsequent breeding, if found, will begin. Used only in the ED and ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

conception_rate_decrease.description: Conception Rate Decrease (percent) -- The percent decrease in conception rate of each breeding after the first breeding

decrease_conception_rate_in_rebreeding.description: Decrease Conception Rate in Rebreeding -- whether or not to decrease the conception rate in rebreeding (default is false)

decrease_conception_rate_by_parity.description: Decrease Conception Rate by Parity -- whether or not to decrease the conception rate by parity (default is false)

avg_gestation_len.description: Average Gestation Length (days) -- Average length of gestation

std_gestation_len.description: Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of gestation length

prefresh_day.description: Prefresh Day -- days prior to calving at which pregnant animals enter the close-up period (i.e., the length of the close-up period)

calving_interval.description: Calving Interval (days) -- Current average calving interval, used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate (fraction) -- The fraction of total heifers in estrus that are detected and inseminated in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol

estrus_conception_rate.description: Estrus Conception Rate (fraction) -- The fraction of inseminated heifers that become pregnant for heifers bred on estrus detection (ED (Estrus Detection) and SynchED protocols)

conception_rate.description: Conception Rate -- The conception rate for TAI breedings in the heifer reproductive program

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The fraction of in-heat heifers that would be detected and inseminated in the SynchED programs

The fraction of in-heat cows that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol, including during the estrus detection portion of ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

ED_conception_rate.description: The fraction of cows with estrus detected that would conceive in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol, including during the estrus detection portion of ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

presynch_program.description: The presynch program (1st breeding) for cow in the TAI protocol. Currently, this is only supported in TAI protocol. When other protocols such as ED or ED-TAI are used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None.

presynch_program_start_day.description: The presynch program start day is the day of the first hormone injection in a presynch program used in the TAI protocol. When a presynch program is followed by an OvSynch program, the start day of the OvSynch program should be on or after the last day of the presynch program. The durations of the 3 options - PreSynch, Double OvSynch, and G6G, are 25, 16, and 8 days, respectively. Because the presynch program is only supported in TAI protocol, this value will be ignored when other protocols such as ED or ED-TAI are used, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

ovsynch_program.description: The OvSynch program to be used for cows in the TAI protocol and the TAI portion of the ED-TAI protocol. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None

ovsynch_program_start_day.description: When set properly in the TAI protocol, OvSynch program start day is the day of the first GnRH injection in an OvSynch program. When the OvSynch program follows a presynch program, the start day of the OvSynch program should be on or after the last day of the presynch program. Otherwise, the OvSynch program will be shifted to start on the last day of the presynch program. When ED-TAI protocol is used and no estrus detected between the end of the voluntary waiting period and this OvSynch program start day, then the OvSynch program will start on this day. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

ovsynch_program_conception_rate.description: The conception rate for the OvSynch program used in the TAI protocol and the TAI portion of the ED-TAI protocol. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

resynch_program.description: Resynch program for cow before/at/after first pregnancy check day in the TAI and ED-TAI repro protocols. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None. If PGFatPD is chosen, the values for estrus detection rate and conception rate to that detected estrus following PGF are determined by estrus_detection_rate and ED_conception_rate. Anytime an insemination is performed after an ovsynch program, the conception rate will be changed to the ovsynch_program_conception_rate.

target_heifer_preg_day.description: Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target age (in days) for heifers to become pregnant - for adjusting heifer body weight

mature_body_weight_avg.description: Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows

mature_body_weight_std.description: Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows

preg_check_day_1.description: Pregnancy Check Days, Check 1 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the 1st pregnancy check

preg_loss_rate_1.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check

preg_check_day_2.description: Pregnancy Check Days, Check 2 (days) --  Days since last insemination at the second pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 1st pregnancy check

preg_loss_rate_2.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 2 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy checks

preg_check_day_3.description: Pregnancy Check Day, Check 3 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the third pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 2nd pregnancy check

preg_loss_rate_3.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 3 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy checks

avg_estrus_cycle_return.description: Average Estrous Cycle Return (days) -- Average days between calving and first estrous cycle after calving

avg_estrus_cycle_heifer.description: Heifer Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for heifers

std_estrus_cycle_heifer.description: Heifer Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)

avg_estrus_cycle_cow.description: Cow Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for cows

std_estrus_cycle_cow.description: Cow Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)

avg_estrus_cycle_after_pgf.description: Average Estrous Cycle days after PGF (days) -- Average days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol

std_estrus_cycle_after_pgf.description: Estrous Cycle days after PGF Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol

culling.description: Defines probabilities and distributions for death and six health-related reasons (feet-and-leg, injury, mastitis, disease, udder, unknown) an animal might be removed (culled) from the herd.

cull_day_count.description: Defines breakpoints that partition the cumulative distribution function (CDF) for culling probabilities into segments. These values correspond to the 'cull_day_prob' array, allowing for more accurate definition of the CDF.The numbers in the array represent days into the lactation (days in milk).

feet_leg_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to feet-and-leg-related health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to feet-and-leg-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six  culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of feet-and-leg-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

injury_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to injury-related health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to injury-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of injury-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

mastitis_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to mastitis-related health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to mastitis-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of mastitis-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

disease_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to disease-related health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to general disease-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of general disease-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

udder_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to udder-related health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to udder-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of udder-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

unknown_cull.description: Cull probabilities due to other health issues.

probability.description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to unknown reasons. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

cull_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of culling for unknown reasons over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

properties.description: Death Probability, by Parity Group -- The probability of death for cows of a single parity group (first lactation, second lactation, etc.); a separate entry should be included for 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th+ parities (4 entries total)

Cull Probability, by Parity Group -- The probability of culling for cows of a single parity group (first lactation, second lactation, etc.); a separate entry should be included for 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th+ parities (4 entries total). Culling refers to removal from the herd while alive.

death_day_prob.description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of death over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

methane_mitigation_method.description: Methane Mitigation Method (select one) -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating cows. Note that default values given are not implemented unless the specific supplement is selected here

3-NOP_additive_amount.description: 3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive

monensin_additive_amount.description: Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive

essential_oils_additive_amount.description: Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive

seaweed_additive_amount.description: Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of seaweed mitigation additive

housing.description: Housing Type (select one) -- The type of housing management for the herd

pasture_concentrate.description: Pasture Concentrate Fed (kg/head/day) -- Amount of concentrate provided to lactating cows each day if animals are housed on pasture

calves.description: Methane emission models to use for calves.

heiferIs.description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIs.

heiferIIs.description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIIs.

heiferIIIs.description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIIIs.

dry cows.description: Methane emission models for dry cows.

lactating cows.description: Methane emission models for lactating cows.

user_input.description: User Input -- A bool value indicating if the user will provide the ration or diet formulation they would like to feed to the cattle (true) or not (false).

formulation_interval.description: Formulation Interval (days) -- The length of time in days between when the diets are reformulated

phosphorus_requirement_buffer.description: Percentage increase in phosphorus nutrient requirement in calculation of animal requirements. The default value is highly recommended as the starting value (e.g. some testing may be required to find a reasonable buffer value). For example, if you wanted to supply 150% of the calculated requirement, you would use a value of 50.

maximum_ration_reformulation_attempts.description: The maximum number of attempts the ration formulation logic will make before stopping. Meant only to catch edge cases that could cause infinite loops. In normal operation, this value should never be reached.

id.description: Pen ID -- The index of the pen

pen_name.description: Pen Name -- The name or identifier of a given pen

animal_combination.description: Animal Combination (select one) -- The valid combinations of animal types that can be in a pen. CALF = Calves; GROWING = HeiferI's and HeiferII's; CLOSE_UP = HeiferIII's and Dry Cows; LAC_COWS = Lactating Cows

vertical_dist_to_milking_parlor.description: Vertical Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor

horizontal_dist_to_milking_parlor.description: Horizontal Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The distance (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor

number_of_stalls.description: Number of Stalls -- The number of stalls in the pen

housing_type.description: Housing Type (select one) -- The type of barn the pen is in

pen_type.description: Pen Type -- The type of pen (freestall, tiestall, open lot, bedded pack)

max_stocking_density.description: Maximum Stocking Density -- The maximum ratio of the number of animals in the pen to the number of stalls in the pen

minutes_away_for_milking.description: Total number of minutes that animals in this pen spend away from the pen for milking each day (being milked or traveling to/from the parlor). This value is only used if the pen contains lactating cows.

first_parlor_processor.description: Name of the parlor cleaning manure handler assigned to this pen. Must be a parlor cleaning handler listed in the manure processors configuration input file  (default file name: example_freestall_processor_configs.json).

parlor_stream_name.description: The stream identifier for the parlor-generated manure.

manure_streams.description: List of the different destinations amongst which manure produced outside the milking parlor is distributed.

stream_name.description: Unique identifier for the manure stream. Must be unique, i.e., not identical to the stream_name field of any other manure stream defined for the same pen.

bedding_name.description: Name of the bedding configuration used for this manure stream. Must match the name of a bedding configuration listed in the animal management file (default file name: refreshed_default_animal.json).

stream_proportion.description: For animals in a single pen, the proportion of manure produced outside of manure deposited in or while moving to or from the milking parlor that is assigned to this manure stream. The proportions of all manure streams defined for one pen must sum to 1.

first_processor.description: Name of the first processor in the manure module that this manure stream enters. Must match the name of processor listed in the manure processors input file (cannot be assigned to a parlor stream handler).

name.description: Unique identifier to reference this bedding configuration. This value should be unique and cannot match the name of any other bedding.

bedding_mass_per_day.description: The daily mass of fresh bedding added to the housing area per animal per day on a wet weight basis (kg). Bedding mass is applied based on the total number of animals in the pen, and is not based on the stream proportion of the manure stream the bedding is assigned to.

bedding_density.description: The density of the bedding on a wet weight basis (kg/m3)

bedding_dry_matter_content.description: The fraction (0.XX) of dry matter in the bedding (unitless).

bedding_carbon_fraction.description: The bedding carbon content as a fraction (0.XX) of total mass, on a wet weight basis (unitless).

bedding_phosphorus_content.description: The bedding phosphorus content as a fraction (0.XX) of total mass, on a wet weight basis (unitless).

sand_removal_efficiency.description: The fraction (0.XX) of the fresh sand added each day that is assumed to be removed by a sand separator, settling lane, etc. immediately following manure removal from the barn (unitless)

conception_rate.description: ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).
ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).
ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).
ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).

birth_year.description: The birth year of the animal.

properties.description: The birth year of the animal.

fat_kg.description: The average fat phenotype values of the animal.

properties.description: The average fat phenotype values of the animal born in the given birth year.

protein_kg.description: The mean protein phenotype values of the animal.

properties.description: The mean protein phenotype values of the animal born in the given birth year.

year_month.description: The birth year and month of the baby calf.

properties.description: The birth year and month of the baby calf.

estimated_protein.description: The estimated protein value for the top listing semen.

properties.description: The estimated protein value for the top listing semen.

estimated_fat.description: The estimated fat value for the top listing semen.

properties.description: The estimated fat value for the top listing semen.

adjustments.description: Adjustment values for the Wood lactation curve coefficients.

parity.description: Wood lactation curve coefficient adjustment values for each parity group (1, 2, 3+).

1.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for parity 1 cows.

2.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for parity 2 cows.

3.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for parity 3+ cows.

year.description: Wood lactation curve coefficient adjustment values for each year from 2006 to 2016.

month.description: Wood lactation curve coefficient adjustment values for each month.

1.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for January.

2.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for February.

3.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for March.

4.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for April.

5.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for May.

6.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for June.

7.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for July.

8.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for August.

9.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for September.

10.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for October.

11.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for November.

12.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for December.

region.description: Wood lactation curve coefficient adjustment values by region.

Appalachian.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Appalachian region.

Corn Belt.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Corn Belt region.

Delta.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Delta region.

Lake.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Mountain region.

Mountain.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Mountain region.

Northeast.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Northeast region.

Northern Plains.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Northern Plains region.

New York.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for New York.

Pennsylvania.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for Pennsylvania.

Southeast.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Southeast region.

Southern Plains.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the Southern Plains region.

West Coast.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for the West Coast region.

Wisconsin.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for Wisconsin.

None.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments when simulating a farm that is not in one defined regions.

milking_frequency.description: Wood lactation curve coefficient adjustment values by milking frequency (either twice or thrice daily).

twice_daily.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for cows that are milked twice daily.

thrice_daily.description: Wood lactation curve adjustments for cows that are milked thrice daily.

state_to_region_mapping.description: Maps the first two digits of FIPS codes (i.e. the state) to the corresponding geographic region as defined by Li et al, 2022. Reference: Li, M., et al. "Investigating the effect of temporal, geographic, and management factors on US Holstein lactation curve parameters." Journal of Dairy Science 105.9 (2022): 7525-7538.

parity_milk_yield_adjustments.description: Parity 2 and 3 milk yield adjustment factors used to estimate 305 day milk yields by parity.

parity_2_305_day_milk_yield_adjustment.description: The parity 2 milk adjustment factor for the 305 day milk yield.

parity_3_305_day_milk_yield_adjustment.description: The parity 3 milk adjustment factor for the 305 day milk yield.

parameter_mean_values.description: Mean values of Wood's Lactation Curve parameters which serve as the defaults for all-lactation models

parameter_l_mean.description: The mean value of Wood's parameter l.

parameter_m_mean.description: The mean value of Wood's parameter m.

parameter_n_mean.description: The mean value of Wood's parameter n.

parameter_standard_deviations.description: Standard deviations of Wood's Lactation Curve parameters.

1.description: Standard deviations of Wood's lactation Curve parameters for parity 1 cows.

parameter_l_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

parameter_m_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

parameter_n_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

2.description: Standard deviations of Wood's lactation Curve parameters for parity 2 cows.

parameter_l_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

parameter_m_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

parameter_n_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

3.description: Standard deviations of Wood's lactation Curve parameters for parity 3+ cows.

parameter_l_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

parameter_m_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

parameter_n_std_dev.description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

crop_schedules.description: Array of all crop schedules to be executed over the run of the simulation.

properties.description: Contains all the properties necessary to create a CropSchedule object.

crop_species.description: Name of the crop being grown. Must be selected from names of configurations defined in the crop configuration input file.

harvest_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to harvest

properties.description: Julian day of year to harvest

harvest_years.description: Calendar years in which the harvesting occurs

harvest_operations.description: Operation(s) with which this crop will be harvested.

harvest_type.description: Whether the crop uses scheduled harvests or optimal harvests

planting_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to plant

planting_years.description: Calendar years in which the planting occurs

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this crop schedule should be repeated.

planting_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between planting schedule repetitions.

harvesting_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between harvest schedule repetitions.

crop_configurations.description: List of crop configurations available for use in crop rotations.

name.description: Unique identifier for the crop configuration.

plant_category.description: Plant category of the crop configuration.

is_nitrogen_fixer.description: Whether the crop configuration is a nitrogen fixer.

optimal_temperature.description: Ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius).

potential_heat_units.description: Total heat units required for maturity (unitless).

max_leaf_area_index.description: Maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless).

first_heat_fraction_point.description: Fraction of growing season for the first point on leaf development curve (unitless).

first_leaf_fraction_point.description: Fraction of max leaf area index at first point on leaf development curve (unitless).

second_heat_fraction_point.description: Fraction of growing season for the second point on leaf development curve (unitless).

second_leaf_fraction_point.description: Fraction of max leaf area index at second point on leaf development curve (unitless).

senescent_heat_fraction.description: Fraction of potential heat units for plant senescence (unitless).

light_use_efficiency.description: Light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ).

emergence_nitrogen_fraction.description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at emergence (unitless).

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction.description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at half-maturity (unitless).

mature_nitrogen_fraction.description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at maturity (unitless).

emergence_phosphorus_fraction.description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at emergence (unitless).

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction.description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at half-maturity (unitless).

mature_phosphorus_fraction.description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at maturity (unitless).

max_root_depth.description: Maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm).

root_distribution_param_da.description: Empirical root distribution parameter d_a (mm). See Fan, Jianling, et al. "Root distribution by depth for temperate agricultural crops." Field Crops Research 189 (2016): 68-74, table 1.

root_distribution_param_c.description: Empirical root distribution parameter c (unitless). See Fan, Jianling, et al. "Root distribution by depth for temperate agricultural crops." Field Crops Research 189 (2016): 68-74, table 1.

optimal_harvest_index.description: Optimal harvest index under ideal growth conditions (unitless).

minimum_harvest_index.description: Minimum harvest index under drought conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage.description: Percentage of fresh yield at harvest that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage.description: Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

crude_protein_percent_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is dietary crude protein at harvest (unitless).

non_protein_nitrogen_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is non-protein nitrogen at harvest (unitless).

starch_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is starch at harvest (unitless).

adf_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is acid detergent fiber at harvest (unitless).

ndf_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is neutral detergent fiber at harvest (unitless).

sugar_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is labile carbohydrate at harvest (unitless).

ash_at_harvest.description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is ash at harvest (unitless).

available_fertilizer_mixes.description: All the available fertilizer mixes that are available besides the default ones.

properties.description: The name and nutrient breakdown of a single fertilizer mix.

N.description: Fraction of nitrogen contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

P.description: Fraction of phosphorus contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

K.description: Fraction of potassium contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

ammonium_fraction.description: Fraction fertilizer nitrogen that is ammonium. All non-ammonium nitrogen is assumed to be nitrate.

mix_names.description: List of the mix names that will be used for the corresponding fertilizer application.

years.description: List of years in which fertilizer will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which fertilizer will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the fertilizer is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of fertilizer which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this fertilizer application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

coverage_fractions.description: List of fractions of how much of the field is covered by the corresponding manure application.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the manure is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of manure which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

manure_types.description: The type of manure which will be requested for the application.

supplement_manure_nutrient_deficiencies.description: Determines if nutrient deficient manure applications are supplemented with chemical fertilizer.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this manure application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which tillage will occur.

days.description: List of days on which tilling will occur.

tillage_depths.description:
List of depths that the corresponding tillage applications reach.
Units: mm.

incorporation_fractions.description: List of fractions of surface pools that get incorporated into the soil during applications.

mixing_fractions.description: List of fractions of soil layer pools that are available to mix into other soil layers.

implements.description: List of tillage implements which will be used to execute the tillage operations.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this tillage schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

properties.description: cost of diesel per gallon
cost of electricity per kwh

natural_gas_cost_kwh.description: cost of natural gas per kwh

properties.description: cost of natural gas per kwh
cost of water per gallon

alfalfa_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from alfalfa tillage

corn_grain_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn grain tillage

corn_silage_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn silage tillage

calf_feeds.description: Calf Feeds (raised off farm - 24 hrs of age).

growing_feeds.description: Growing Feeds (HeiferI and HeiferII - return at 20 months) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding. Heifer II is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy.

close_up_feeds.description: Close Up Feeds (HeiferIII and Dry Cows) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers and Dry Cows are non-lactating cows.

buffer.description: Fractional number 0 to 1 as a cushion for feed purchases to help plan for herd fluctuations and feed shrink.

milk_reduction_maximum.description: Milk Reduction Maximum -- Allowable amount of milk reduction (kg) when dietary nutrient supply cannot meet animal requirements

tolerance.description: Tolerance -- Allowable +/- fraction variance for each of the defined ration inclusion percentage values. As an example: a feed with a user defined ration percentage value of 20% and tolerance of 0.1 would correspond to an allowable range of 18% to 22%.

max_daily_feed_recalculations_per_year.description: The maximum number of feed recalculations that can be performed per year.

runtime_purchase_allowance.description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds on a single day. These are set by the user.

advance_purchase_allowance.description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds at the beginning of a ration interval. These are set by the user.

planning_cycle_allowance.description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds at the beginning of a new planning cycle. These are set by the user.

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

Name.description: A general common name for the feed as defined within RuFaS.

feed_description.description: A more specific description of the feed that uniquely distinguishes it from other feeds with a similar or same name.

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed (group).

units.description: The unit of measurement used for the feed.

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed.

properties.pattern: ^(Animal Protein|By-Product/Other|Calf Liquid Feed|Energy Source|Fat Supplement|Fatty Acid Supplement|Grain Crop Forage|Grass/Legume Forage|Pasture|Plant Protein|Vitamin/Mineral|NPN Supplement)$

DM.description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

CP.description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

NDICP.description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

ADICP.description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

Kd.description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

dRUP.description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

is_wetforage.description: Identifier of wet forage type feed.

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

properties.pattern: ^(Animal Protein|By-Product/Other|Calf Liquid Feed|Energy Source|Fat Supplement|Fatty Acid Supplement|Grain Crop Forage|Grass/Legume Forage|Pasture|Plant Protein|Vitamin/Mineral|NPN Supplement)$

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed.

DM.description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

CP.description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

Kd.description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

dRUP.description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

ADICP.description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

NDICP.description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

is_wetforage.description: Identifier of wet forage type feed.

anaerobic_digester.description: A list of all configurations for anaerobic digesters.

properties.description: Configuration for an anaerobic digester.

name.description: The unique identifier of the anaerobic digester. Cannot match the name of any other manure processor.

processor_type.description: The type of anaerobic digester used.

anaerobic_digestion_temperature_set_poin.description: Temperature set point of the anaerobic digester (degrees C).

hydraulic_retention_time.description: Number of days on average that manure spends in the anaerobic digester (days).

biogas_leakage_fraction.description: Fraction of methane generated in the anaerobic digester that escapes to the atmosphere through unintended  leakage and is not collected by the gas capture system (unitless).

handler.description: A list of all configurations for handlers.

properties.description: Configuration for a handler processor.

name.description: The unique identifier of the handler processor. Cannot match the name of any other manure processor.

cleaning_water_use_amount.description: Amount of total (recycled plus fresh) cleaning water used per animal per day (L/animal/day).

cleaning_water_recycle_fraction.description: Fraction of cleaning water that is from recycled (not fresh) water sources (unitless).

use_parlor_flush.description: This input is applicable only to parlor cleaning handlers. Indicator for if a flush system is used in the milking parlor and/or holding area. This flush water may be partially or fully recycled and is in addition to routine parlor cleaning that utilizes only fresh water.

separator.description: A list of all configurations for separator processors.

properties.description: Configuration for a separator processor.

name.description: The unique identifier of the separator.

separated_solids_dry_matter.description: The dry matter fraction (0.XX percent DM by mass) of manure solids generated from solid liquid separation.

total_solids_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing total solids from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

volatile_solids_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing volatile solids from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

nitrogen_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing nitrogen from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

ammoniacal_nitrogen_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing ammoniacal nitrogen from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

phosphorus_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing phosphorus from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

potassium_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing potassium from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

ash_efficiency.description: The efficiency of the separator in removing ash from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

storage.description: A list of all configurations for Storages.

properties.description: Configuration for a storage processor.

name.description: The unique identifier of the storage processor.

capacity.description: The volumetric capacity of the storage (m^3).

cover.description: The type of cover used with the specified storage.

storage_time_period.description: The length of time (days) manure is stored for between emptying events.

surface_area.description: The surface area of the manure storage (m^2).

composting_type.description: Composting method, applicable only to the composting storage type.

is_mixed.description: Indicator for if the bedded pack is regularly mixed to promote composting activity.

processor_connections.description: A list of processor connection configurations indicating the proportion(s) and destination(s) of the output of all non-separator manure processor(s).

properties.description: The output destination(s) and the corresponding proportion(s) of the output of the non-separator processors (handlers, digesters, and storages).

processor_name.description: The unique identifier of a non-separator processor.

destinations.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the non-separator processor.

properties.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the non-separator processor.

receiving_processor_name.description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

proportion.description: The proportion of the origin processor output to be passed to the receiving processor.

separator_connections.description: A list of processor connection configurations indicating the proportion(s) and destination(s) of the output of all separator processors.

properties.description: The output destination(s) and the corresponding proportion(s) of the output of the separator processor.

processor_name.description: The unique identifier of a separator processor.

liquid_output_destinations.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the liquid output of the separator processor.

properties.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the liquid output of the separator processor.

receiving_processor_name.description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

proportion.description: The proportion of the origin separator liquid output to be passed to the receiving processor.

solid_output_destinations.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the solid output of the separator processor.

properties.description: The destination processor(s) and their corresponding proportion(s) to receive from the solid output of the separator processor.

receiving_processor_name.description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

proportion.description: The proportion of the origin separator solid output to be passed to the receiving processor.

second_moisture_condition_parameter.description:
Curve number parameter for average moisture condition equation.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - CN2.

average_subbasin_slope.description:
Slope of the field, measured as rise over run.
Units: meters / meters or unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - HRU_SLP.

slope_length.description:
Length of the slope.
Units: meters.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - SLSUBBSN.

manning_roughness_coefficient.description:
Manning's "n" value for overland flow.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - OV_N.

support_practice_factor.description:
Ratio of soil loss with a specific support practice based on slope characteristics.This value adjusts for terracing, contouring, and stripcropping, and these features are not present in V1, so this value IS NOT used.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - USLE_P.

albedo.description:
Ratio of solar radiation reflected by soil to amount of incident upon it.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ALB

initial_residue.description:
Amount of residue present on the soil surface at the start of the simulation.
Units: kg / ha.

humus_mineralization_rate_factor.description:
Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P).
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CMN.

denitrification_rate_coefficient.description:
Controls the rate of denitrification.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CDN.

denitrification_threshold_water_content.description:
Fraction of field capacity water content above which denitrification takes place.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - SDNCO

residue_fresh_organic_mineralization_rat.description:
Fraction of residue that will decompose in a day given optimal conditions.
Unitless.
Reference SWAT Input: .BSN - RSDCO.

soil_evaporation_compensation_coefficien.description:
Modifies depth distribution used to meet soil evaporative demand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU, .BSN - ESCO

soil_layers.description: The soil layers that this profile contains. Each element of the array should be a `soil_layer` object.

properties.description: This represents a single soil layer.

bottom_depth.description:
Bottom depth of this soil layer.
Units: mm.

soil_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

wilting_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

field_capacity_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

saturation_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in a layer when it has become saturated.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

saturated_hydraulic_conductivity.description:
Measure of ease of water movement through the soil.
Units: mm / hour.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_K.

initial_temperature.description:
Temperature of the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: degrees Celsius.

bulk_density.description:
Ratio of mass of solid particles to total volume of soil.
Units: Megagrams / cubic meter or grams / cubic centimeter.

organic_carbon_fraction.description:
Fraction of soil weight that is organic carbon.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CBN.

clay_fraction.description:
Fraction of soil weight that is clay.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CLAY.

silt_fraction.description:
Fraction of soil weight that is silt.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SILT.

sand_fraction.description:
Fraction of soil weight that is sand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SAND.

rock_fraction.description:
Fraction of soil weight that is rock.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ROCK.

initial_labile_inorganic_phosphorus_conc.description:
Concentration of labile inorganic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_fresh_organic_phosphorus_concent.description:
Concentration of fresh organic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_nitrate_concentration.description:
Concentration of nitrate in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_ammonium_concentration.description:
Concentration of ammonium in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

ammonium_volatilization_cation_exchange_.description:
Controls the rate of ammonium volatilization.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical Documentation eqn. 3:1.3.5.

soil_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's soil specification.

crop_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's crop schedule specification.

fertilizer_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's fertilizer application schedule specification.

manure_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's manure application schedule specification.

tillage_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's tillage application schedule specification.

absolute_latitude.description:
The absolute latitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

longitude.description:
The longitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

minimum_daylength.description:
Length of the shortest day of the year for watershed the field is located in.
Units: hours.

seasonal_high_water_table.description:
True if the HRU that contains the field has a high seasonal water table, false otherwise.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical documentation section 2:3.2, SWAT Input .HRU - IWATABLE.

watering_amount_in_liters.description:
Amount of water to be applied as irrigation at the end of a specified interval.
Units: liters.

watering_interval.description:
Number of days that make up the irrigation interval.
Units: days.

simulate_water_stress.description: Whether water stress affects crops grown in this field.

simulate_temp_stress.description: Whether temperature stress affects crops grown in this field.

simulate_nitrogen_stress.description: Whether nitrogen stress affects crops grown in this field.

simulate_phosphorus_stress.description: Whether phosphrorus stress affects crops grown in this field.

high.description: The maximum air temperature of the day (°C).

low.description: The minimum air temperature of the day (°C).

avg.description: The average air temperature of the day (°C).

Hday.description: The solar radiation of the day (MJ m^-2).

properties.description: Irrigation (mm H2O).

ID.description: Unique integer identifier for the data entry

Tractor Size.description: The categorical size of the tractor

Depth.description: How deep in the soil the implement goes, refer to the value generated by Crop and Soil module if application is tilling, manure application, or fertalizer application

Tractor Implement.description: The implement that is attached to the tractor

Tractor A (unitless).description: Parameter A as described in the scientific references

Tractor B (unitless).description: Parameter B as described in the scientific references

Tractor C (unitless).description: Parameter C as described in the scientific references

Tractor Implement Width (m).description: The width of the implement in meters

Tractor Implement Mass (kg).description: The mass of the implement in kg

Tractor E (unitless).description: Parameter E as described in the scientific references

Tractor F (unitless).description: Parameter F as described in the scientific references

Tractor G (unitless).description: Parameter G as described in the scientific references

is depth relevant.description: true if depth is relevant for attachment operation, otherwise false

Max Throughput (tons dm/hour).description: The maximum throughput of the implement (tons dm/hour)

constants.description: The constants used in EEE module.

end_to_end_test_result_paths.description: List of paths to results used to execute end-to-end testing, as well as the domain that they are in.

domain.description: Indicates which domain of RuFaS is being tested with the associated paths.

expected_results_path.description: Path to the file with the expected results for the specified domain.

actual_results_path.description: Path to the file with the actual results for the specified domain.

tolerance.description: The relative tolerance (expressed as a percent) used to compare expected and actual results for changed values found in the e2e results comparison.

domain.description: Indicates which domain of RuFaS is being tested with the associated paths.

expected_results_path.description: Path to the file with the expected results for the specified domain.

actual_results_path.description: Path to the file with the actual results for the specified domain.

tolerance.description: The relative tolerance (expressed as a percent) used to compare expected and actual results for changed values found in the e2e results comparison.

domain.description: Indicates which domain of RuFaS is being tested with the associated paths.

expected_results_path.description: Path to the file with the expected results for the specified domain.

actual_results_path.description: Path to the file with the actual results for the specified domain.

tolerance.description: The relative tolerance (expressed as a percent) used to compare expected and actual results for changed values found in the e2e results comparison.

grain_storage.description: A list of dry grain types that can be stored in a dry grain storage unit.

properties.description: Dry grain storage unit.

name.description: User defined name of the feed storage unit.

crop_name.description: Name of crop to be stored in the feed storage unit.

field_names.description: Name of the all fields associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

properties.description: Name of the field associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

dm_loss_coefficient.description: Dry matter loss coefficient for the grain storage (unitless).

initial_storage_dry_matter.description: Initial dry matter content of grain at time of storage (unitless).

rufas_id.description: RuFaS Feed ID which harvests from the crop stored in this unit can be fed to animals as. Must be selected from the "rufas_id" of the feed library used.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity of the storage (kg dry matter).

hay_storage.description: A list of hay types that can be stored in a hay storage unit.

properties.description: Hay storage unit.

name.description: User defined name of the feed storage unit.

crop_name.description: Name of crop to be stored in the feed storage unit.

field_names.description: Name of the all fields associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

properties.description: Name of the field associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

additional_dry_matter_loss_coefficient.description: Additional dry matter loss coefficient for the hay storage (unitless).

initial_storage_dry_matter.description: Initial dry matter content of hay at time of storage (unitless).

target_dry_matter.description: Target dry matter content of hay after drying down in storage (unitless).

rufas_id.description: RuFaS Feed ID which harvests from the crop stored in this unit can be fed to animals as. Must be selected from the "rufas_id" of the feed library used.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity of the storage (kg dry matter).

baleage_storage.description: A list of baleage types that can be stored in a baleage storage unit.

properties.description: Baleage storage unit.

name.description: User defined name of the feed storage unit.

crop_name.description: Name of crop to be stored in the feed storage unit.

field_names.description: Name of the all fields associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

properties.description: Name of the field associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

bale_density.description: Density of baleage bales (kg dry matter / cubic meter).

initial_storage_dry_matter.description: Initial dry matter content of baleage at time of storage (unitless).

post_wilting_moisture_percentage.description: The post-wilting moisture level that baleage will dry down to.

rufas_id.description: RuFaS Feed ID which harvests from the crop stored in this unit can be fed to animals as. Must be selected from the "rufas_id" of the feed library used.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity of the storage (kg dry matter).

silage_storage.description: A list of silage types that can be stored in a silage storage unit.

properties.description: Silage storage unit.

name.description: User defined name of the feed storage unit.

crop_name.description: Name of crop to be stored in the feed storage unit.

field_names.description: Name of the all fields associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

properties.description: Name of the field associated with the crop to be stored in feed storage unit.

initial_storage_dry_matter.description: Initial dry matter content of silage at time of storage (unitless).

rufas_id.description: RuFaS Feed ID which harvests from the crop stored in this unit can be fed to animals as. Must be selected from the "rufas_id" of the feed library used.

capacity.description: Maximum capacity of the storage (kg dry matter).

feed_storages.description: A list of feed storage instances that are used on the farm.

properties.description: The reference to the name of the storage from the `feed_storage_configurations` input.

parallel_workers.description: How many parallel workers should Task Manager use

export_input_data_to_csv.description: Select this flag to export the input data pool into a CSV file for all tasks.

input_data_csv_export_path.description: The path to save the exported input data CSV file.

input_data_csv_import_path.description: If user wish to compare the input data with previous runs, the user can pass in the previously saved input data CSV path. The result will be combined together for a side-by-side comparison.

tasks.description: The list of things that Task Manager should do in an unordered manner

task_type.description: What kind of task is this?

metadata_file_path.description: The path to the metadata JSON files to load and use in the Input Manager of this task

input_root.description: Root directory for all input files.

properties_file_path.description: The path to the first metadata properties JSON file to load and compare to the other metadata file loaded

comparison_properties_file_path.description: The path to the second metadata properties JSON file to load and compare to the other metadata file loaded

convert_variable_table_path.description: The path to the CSV file that contains the previous and the new name of variables.

output_prefix.description: Will be used to generate a name for each of the output files for this task.

log_verbosity.description: Specifies the level of log type to be printed on console.

variable_name_style.description: The formatting option for variable_names.txt file

init_herd.description: Select this flag if you want to initialize the herd by generating a herd population through simulation.

save_animals.description: Choose this flag if you want to save the generated herd data into a JSON file.

save_animals_directory.description: The saving directory for animals if save_animals is set to true

filters_directory.description: The directory for the files containing the output filters

csv_output_directory.description: The directory for the csv output files to be saved

json_output_directory.description: The directory for the JSON output files to be saved.

report_directory.description: The directory for reports to be saved to.

logs_directory.description: The directory for saving log message files, variable names, and other simulation outputs to.

suppress_log_files.description: If true, logs will not be written as output files.

run_eee.description: Run the emissions, energy, and economics estimators prior to post-processing.

load_saved_output_pools.description: Load previously saved output pools prior to post-processing.

saved_output_pools.description: Collection of saved output pools to reload before post-processing.

name.description: Identifier applied to variables loaded from this pool.

path.description: File path to the saved output pool JSON file.

output_pool_path.description: The path to a JSON files to load the Output Manager's pool from for post processing

random_seed.description: The random seed, set it to 0 to auto-generate it

chunkification.description: Whether to periodically save the output variable pool to a file.

save_chunk_threshold_call_count.description: The threshold add variable call count for saving the output variable pool chunk.

maximum_memory_usage.description: The maximum memory usage in Bytes.

maximum_memory_usage_percent.description: The maximum percentage of memory use. If save_chunk_threshold_call_count is provided, then that is what is used to determine when to chunk, otherwise it is maximum memory usage, otherwise it is max memory usage percent.

multi_run_counts.description: If task type is multi_run, indicates how many single simulations should run.

skip_values.description: The number of points in the sampling sequence to skip for Sensitivity Analysis

sampler_n.description: The number of samples to generate for Sensitivity Analysis. Ideally a power of 2 and >= 'skip_values'

SA_input_variables.description: The input variables to perform Sensitivity Analysis on

variable_name.description: The name of the variable to be sampled, has to match within Input Manager Pool

data_type.description: Specifies the data type of this variable

SA_load_balancing_start.description: The lower bound value for sensitivity analysis load balancing

SA_load_balancing_stop.description: The upper bound value for sensitivity analysis load balancing

cross_validation_file_paths.description: List the of file path(s) to the cross validation rule JSON file(s).

properties.description: The path to the cross validation rule JSON files.
